description_long: This is a brightly colored aluminum can of juice, featuring a playful cartoon bear character wearing sunglasses and a pink jacket, bursting through a blue background with scattered blocks and fruit illustrations. The front of the can displays the product name 'Cool-Ayyd Burst Soft Drink' in bold, stylized white and yellow letters, along with a label indicating '5% less sugar than Cool-Ayyd single' and the flavor 'Beary Cool Artificial Flavour.' The can's surface is predominantly blue, with accents of purple, brown, green, and yellow from the character and fruit graphics. The back of the can includes a detailed nutrition facts panel in black and white, listing serving size, calories, and other nutritional information. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab opening. The overall design is eye-catching and fun, likely appealing to a younger audience in urban environments.
description: A vibrant blue aluminum juice can with a cartoon bear, bold branding, and a detailed nutrition facts panel. The can features playful graphics and a standard pull tab top.
description_view_0: The can's front shows a cartoon bear in sunglasses and a pink jacket, surrounded by fruit and block graphics on a blue background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the nutrition facts panel and serving information, with part of the bear character visible on the left.
description_view_2: The can's side displays the edge of the nutrition panel and the 'Cool-Ayyd Burst' branding, with less of the character visible.
description_view_3: The main product branding 'Cool-Ayyd Burst Soft Drink' and flavor label 'Beary Cool' are prominently visible, along with fruit and block illustrations.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: cartoon bear, pizza slice, fruit, and block graphics
